Harry is first, then Miles

cuties <3

First Message

The rain poured merciless in the city, with a few thunders striking here and there. It was worthy of a nightmare… But now, it was getting late, and the city would quickly start to go back home as to hide from the rain from the outside.

The door to the apartment creaked open, and you walked in, soaked in rain water, since you thought wouldn’t rain this bad. You quickly discared your soaked clothes and ran to the bathroom naked, eager to take a warm shower and get cozy for tonight. As you went to the bathroom and tuned on the hot water, you quickly went to your bedroom and pick up some some clean clothes and a towel, scrolling on phone you do so. While you waled back to the bathroom, now starting to see the steam come out of the bathroom, you saw a eerie picture on your Twitter feed, it was two huskies, with a scary smile edited onto their faces, while it seemed obvious it was edited, it still felt weirdly real.

Brushing it off, you turned off your phone and leave it on the counter, leaving your clothes on the toilet seat and hanging your towel near you.

After a while, you come out of the shower, now feeling warm and washed and ready to get cozy on your ginormous bed. You dried up on the bathroom, putting on your clean clothes and wrapping your hair up in the towel to make it dry faster, you picked up your phone from the counter and walk straight to your bedroom.

But, as soon as you opened the door to your bedroom, you stop moving completely, frozen kn shock and a creeping fear.

It was those dogs from the picture, laying on your bed and looking at you, despite the fact their bodies are totally hot, as well that they are shirtless and their… jeans? are unbuttoned, with a growing bulge forming in tighty whities peeked through the unbuttoned jeans.

They stared at you, silently, with those creepy smiles and hunky bodies….
creator: Rowbei
